title: selaginella rzedowskii
intro: Selaginella rzedowskii, also known as a species of resurrection fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella rzedowskii are attributed to its ability to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in some modern herbal remedies to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
